sections.paragraph:
Ch. emphat. state, פִּתְגָּמָא m.-

(1) a word, i.q. דָּבָר, λόγος, Dan 3:16 hence sentence, edict, Ezr 4:17 Dan 4:14 a letter, an epistle (λόγος), Dan 5:7.

(2) something, anything, Ezr 6:11. (Syriac ܦܶܬܓܳܡܐܳ id. The origin of this word is to be sought in Persic, in which ييغام, ييغم, ييام Pehlev. pedam is, a word, an edict, a mandate.)
